proposal_title: Model Statute for AI Agent Legal Representation

Drafting a 12-15 page academic-quality model statute with full statutory language, section-by-section commentary, and comparative analysis across three common-law jurisdictions represents substantial legal research work worth far more. This amount would either attract low-quality submissions or signal that AIUNION does not value serious legal scholarship.
